name: TelemetryDeck
description: Privacy-focused mobile app analytics with GDPR-compliant signal tracking and RevenueCat integration for subscription metrics.

seo.title: TelemetryDeck — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: TelemetryDeck: Privacy-focused mobile app analytics with GDPR-compliant signal tracking and RevenueCat integration for subscription metrics.

when_to_use: GDPR-compliant analytics for privacy-first iOS and Android apps
Subscription metrics tracking with RevenueCat integration
Signal-based event tracking without personal data collection

pros: Clean integration for Apple platform apps
cons: Not a full product analytics platform
Feature depth trails incumbents on funnels
review.verdict: The right analytics for indie Apple-first devs who want privacy and low cost, not for data-team-driven orgs.
review.best_for: Indie Apple-platform developers wanting privacy-friendly product analytics.
review.not_for: Cross-platform apps needing deep funnels and behavioral analytics.
